creator: trevis@silencedpoet.com
text:
Created attachment 191039
updates version, moves package name to eternalterminal

Upstream has requested that the package be moved to eternalterminal [1]. Further a new version was released. So I've attempted, at least, to package both of those changes up together in this diff. 


Subversion is a little foreign to me, so perhaps I missed part of it? Will gladly take any feedback for better contributions going forward though!




[1] https://github.com/MisterTea/EternalTCP/pull/92#issuecomment-368179461
